title: dlpscan configuration
description: Schema for .dlpscanrc and dlpscan.json configuration files.

min_confidence.description: Ignore findings below this confidence threshold (0.0-1.0).

require_context.description: Only report findings that have a context keyword nearby.

deduplicate.description: Remove overlapping findings, keeping the highest confidence one.

max_matches.description: Maximum findings per scan (prevents memory exhaustion).

categories.description: Scan only these categories (null = all). See `dlpscan categories`.

allowlist.description: Exact text values to suppress (e.g., test credit card numbers).

ignore_patterns.description: Regex patterns for text to ignore.

ignore_paths.description: File path globs to skip in directory scans.

context_backend.description: Context matching engine (usually leave as default).

blocked_extensions.description: File extensions to block in pipeline scans. Default includes crypto certs (der, p12, pfx, p7m, p8, ppk, jks, gpg, pgp, asc, etc.).

block_unreadable.description: Also block executables, encrypted containers, and media files (.exe, .dll, .gpg, .kdbx, etc.).

entropy_scan.description: Entropy-based secret detection mode. 'gated' (recommended for production) requires context keywords; 'assignment' requires KEY=VALUE pattern; 'all' flags every high-entropy token.

examples.description: Production configuration with low false positives
